caption: The video captures a man performing live music in front of an audience. He is seated and playing an acoustic guitar while singing into a microphone. The performer is wearing a white shirt with a black vest that features intricate blue embroidery and a red design on the front. His hair is tied back, and he wears glasses. The setting appears to be indoors, with wooden blinds covering the windows behind him. The audience, visible in the foreground, is attentively watching and listening to his performance. The atmosphere suggests a casual yet engaging musical event, possibly in a community or school setting, as indicated by the "ORCA" logo in the bottom right corner of the screen.
